welcome.title: 🍳 Kitchen Cooking Engine
welcome.select_appliance: Select an appliance to get started
welcome.no_appliances: No appliances configured yet. Add one in Settings → Devices & Services.
welcome.previous_cooks_description: View and restart your past cooking sessions
welcome.configure_ai_agent: Configure your AI agent to enable the Recipe Builder
welcome.measurement_se_description: krm · tsk · msk · cl · dl · l · g · hg · kg — Temperature in °C
welcome.measurement_uk_description: tsp · tbsp · ml · dl · l · g · kg — Temperature in °C
welcome.measurement_us_description: tsp · tbsp · cup · fl oz · oz · lb — Temperature in °F

meater.title: 🌡️ MEATER Cooking
meater.select_protein: Select your protein and preferences below
meater.swedish_description: Using Swedish temperature recommendations from Livsmedelsverket, Stekguiden.se and Gårdssällskapet.
meater.international_description: Using international temperature guidelines from USDA, FDA and professional culinary sources.
meater.custom_temp_description: Set a target temperature and start monitoring — no protein or doneness selection needed.
meater.start_meater_desc: Select protein, set target, monitor temperature
meater.recent_meater_desc: View and restart previous temperature-based cooks
meater.no_previous_cooks_hint: Temperature-based cooks you complete will appear here for easy restart.
meater.waiting_probe:
Waiting for the probe to begin monitoring.
Take the probe out of the charger to start.
meater.sensor_not_connected: Please ensure your MEATER device is connected and the Kitchen Cooking Engine integration is set up.

ninja.title: 🥷 Ninja Combi
ninja.recipe_builder_desc: Create custom recipes with Ninja Combi modes
ninja.ai_recipe_desc: Generate AI recipes using your Ninja Combi
ninja.recent_cooks_desc: View and restart previous Ninja Combi recipes
ninja.builder_desc: Build custom Combi-Meal recipes with automatic parameter adjustment
ninja.veggie_hint: 💡 Tender veggies cook with base, crispy veggies cook with protein
ninja.use_meater_probe: 🌡️ Use MEATER+ probe for temperature monitoring
ninja.select_base_protein_hint: 👆 Select a base and protein to see calculated parameters
ninja.no_built_in: No built-in recipes available. Check back later!
ninja.no_recent_ninja: No previous Ninja Combi cooks found.
ninja.no_recent_ninja_hint: Recipes you cook with Ninja Combi will appear here.

ai_recipe.title: 🤖 AI Recipe Builder
ai_recipe.settings_description: Configure which AI conversation agent to use for recipe generation.
ai_recipe.find_agent_tip: Find your agent ID in Developer Tools → States — look for entities starting with "conversation."
ai_recipe.select_ingredients_hint: Choose ingredients you have available (select at least 2)
ai_recipe.select_cuisine_hint: Select a cuisine to see its typical ingredients
ai_recipe.no_suggestions: No suggestions generated. Try different ingredients or style.
ai_recipe.cuisine_region_hint: Select a cuisine to see its typical ingredients. Pick from multiple regions for fusion cooking.
ai_recipe.choose_ingredients_label: Choose ingredients you have available (select at least 2):
ai_recipe.ai_busy_hint: The AI service is busy. Your request is being retried automatically.
ai_recipe.switching_backup: Switching to backup AI agent — hang on!
ai_recipe.create_desc: Generate custom recipes using your appliances and ingredients
ai_recipe.setup_ai_desc: Configure your AI agent to start generating recipes
ai_recipe.recent_desc: View and restart previous AI recipes for this appliance
ai_recipe.no_history_appliance: No cooking history for this appliance yet. Create your first AI recipe!
ai_recipe.incomplete_message: Please complete ingredient and style selection

rating.how_did_it_go: How did it go? Please rate your experience:
rating.ease_recipe_desc: How easy was this recipe to follow?
rating.result_recipe_desc: How did the final dish turn out?
rating.result_cook_desc: How did the final result turn out?
rating.notes_placeholder: Any notes, modifications, or thoughts about this cook...
rating.both_required: ⚠️ Please provide both ratings to save this cook

history.title: 📋 Cook History
history.no_cooks_message: No cooks recorded yet. Complete a cooking session to see it here!

appliances.title: 🔧 Kitchen Appliances
appliances.setup_step1: Go to Settings → Devices & Services → Add Integration
appliances.setup_step2: Search for Kitchen Cooking Engine and add your appliances.
appliances.tip: Add more appliances to unlock more recipes!
appliances.tip_detail: Each appliance brings its own features and compatible recipes.
appliances.setup_integration: Please configure the Kitchen Cooking Engine integration first.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

messages.cook_session_started_detail: The cooking session is now active.
messages.notes_saved: Feature modification notes have been saved.
messages.notes_save_error: Failed to save feature notes. Please try again.
messages.incomplete_selection: Please complete ingredient and style selection
messages.loading_recipe: Generating full recipe details with AI...
messages.partial_recipe_error: Could not load full recipe details from AI.
messages.partial_recipe_fallback: You can still see the ingredients overview and finish the cook.
messages.invalid_temp: Please set a temperature between 30°C and 100°C.
messages.no_instructions: Step-by-step instructions not available. Use the recipe description and ingredients above as your guide.
messages.no_ingredients: Ingredient details not available for this recipe.
messages.configure_ai_agent: Configure which AI conversation agent to use for recipe generation.
messages.find_agent_hint: Find your agent ID in Developer Tools → States - look for entities starting with "conversation."
messages.start_cook_failed: Failed to start cook on this session. Please start a new cook manually.
messages.no_meater_entity: No cooking session entity found. Please set up a MEATER probe first.
messages.restart_cook_failed: Failed to restart cook. The cook data may be incompatible. Please start a new cook manually.
messages.restart_not_supported: This cook type cannot be automatically restarted. Please set up a new cook manually.
messages.load_history_failed: Failed to load MEATER cook history.
messages.load_history_check:
Please check:
1. Integration is running
2. Home Assistant logs for errors
3. Browser console for details
messages.no_ninja_recipes: No Ninja Combi recipes available. Please ensure the integration is up to date.
messages.load_appliances_failed: Failed to load appliances. Please check your connection.
messages.load_recipes_failed: Failed to load recipes. Please check your connection.
messages.no_probe_for_recipe: This recipe requires temperature monitoring, but no MEATER+ probe is configured.
messages.add_probe_instructions:
Please add a MEATER+ appliance in:
Settings → Devices & Services → Add Integration → Kitchen Cooking Engine
messages.configure_probe_hint: Please ensure your MEATER+ probe is configured properly.
messages.recipe_loaded_instructions:
Now configure your cook on the setup screen:
- Select protein and cut
- Choose doneness level
- Select cooking method
- Start your cook
messages.recipe_loaded_tip: Tip: The recipe "{name}" works best with {appliances}.
